revision.comment: Update QID contradictions report with correct pages

revision.text:
== QID Contradictions Report ==
This page lists pages where the actual Wikidata QID does not match the expected mapping. For each contradiction, the correct page (that actually has the expected QID) is also listed.
'''Total contradictions found: 30''' * Pages with correct page found: 29 * Pages where correct page not found: 1
=== Summary Table ===
{| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! # !! Wrong Page !! Expected QID !! Actual QID !! Correct Page(s) |- | 1 || [[Futsuno Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039005}} || {{wikidata link|Q135041412}} || [[Futsuno Shrine (Q135039005)]] |- | 2 || [[Government-General of Korea]] || {{wikidata link|Q106234557}} || {{wikidata link|Q125097168}} || NOT FOUND |- | 3 || [[Hafuritano Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039044}} || {{wikidata link|Q135041152}} || [[Hafuritano Shrine (Q135039044)]] |- | 4 || [[Hatano Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039019}} || {{wikidata link|Q135039322}} || [[Hatano Shrine (Q135039019)]] |- | 5 || [[Hatorino Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135098838}} || {{wikidata link|Q135039355}} || [[Hatorino Shrine (Q135098838)]] |- | 6 || [[Honoikatsuchino Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135038947}} || {{wikidata link|Q135021838}} || [[Honoikatsuchino Shrine (Q135038947)]] |- | 7 || [[Izanagi Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q11379365}} || {{wikidata link|Q10884977}} || [[Izanagi Shrine (Q11379365)]] |- | 8 || [[Kahamatano Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039016}} || {{wikidata link|Q135039358}} || [[Kahamatano Shrine (Q135039016)]] |- | 9 || [[Kakitano Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039192}} || {{wikidata link|Q135041179}} || [[Kakitano Shrine (Q135039192)]] |- | 10 || [[Kamo Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039165}} || {{wikidata link|Q135041288}} || [[Kamo Shrine (Q135039165)]] |- | 11 || [[Kamono Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135098878}} || {{wikidata link|Q135041305}} || [[Kamono Shrine (Q135098878)]] |- | 12 || [[Kamusakino Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039190}} || {{wikidata link|Q135039267}} || [[Kamusakino Shrine (Q135039190)]] |- | 13 || [[Kataoka Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q43594918}} || {{wikidata link|Q135186659}} || [[Kataoka Shrine (Q43594918)]] |- | 14 || [[Kawamata Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q11553360}} || {{wikidata link|Q135186649}} || [[Kawamata Shrine (Q11553360)]] |- | 15 || [[Kineno Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039225}} || {{wikidata link|Q135039247}} || [[Kineno Shrine (Q135039225)]] |- | 16 || [[Kinpu Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q3197197}} || {{wikidata link|Q135195066}} || [[Kinpu Shrine (Q3197197)]] |- | 17 || [[Kuhiwokano Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135038802}} || {{wikidata link|Q135040575}} || [[Kuhiwokano Shrine (Q135038802)]] |- | 18 || [[Murayano Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135098841}} || {{wikidata link|Q135041269}} || [[Murayano Shrine (Q135098841)]] |- | 19 || [[Nagata Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q661395}} || {{wikidata link|Q135069149}} || [[Nagata Shrine (Q661395)]] |- | 20 || [[Nifuno Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135038979}} || {{wikidata link|Q135040103}} || [[Nifuno Shrine (Q135038979)]] |- | 21 || [[Nomano Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039228}} || {{wikidata link|Q135040289}} || [[Nomano Shrine (Q135039228)]] |- | 22 || [[Nomi Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q11646130}} || {{wikidata link|Q135190182}} || [[Nomi Shrine (Q11646130)]] |- | 23 || [[Ohokurano Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135038788}} || {{wikidata link|Q135040114}} || [[Ohokurano Shrine (Q135038788)]] |- | link|Q135040229}} || [[Okami Shrine (Hirakata)]], [[Okami Shrine (Q11493042)]] |- | 26 || [[Okamino Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039195}} || {{wikidata link|Q135041248}} || [[Okamino Shrine (Q135039195)]] |- | 27 || [[Sai Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135098830}} || {{wikidata link|Q135070095}} || [[Sai Shrine (Q135098830)]] |- | 28 || [[Sakahino Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q135039131}} |- | 30 || [[Takase Shrine]] || {{wikidata link|Q11671973}} || {{wikidata link|Q3791906}} || [[Takase Shrine (Q11671973)]] |}

== QID Contradictions Report ==
This page lists pages where the actual Wikidata QID does not match the expected mapping. For each contradiction, the correct page (that actually has the expected QID) is also listed.
'''Total contradictions found: 30''' * Pages with correct page found: 29 * Pages where correct page not found: 1
=== Summary Table ===
{| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! # !! Wrong Page !! Expected QID !! Actual QID !! == QID Contradictions Report ==
This page lists pages where the actual Wikidata QID does not match the expected mapping. For each contradiction, the correct page (that actually has the expected QID) is also listed.
'''Total contradictions found: 30''' * Pages with correct page found: 29 * Pages where correct page not found: 1
=== Summary Table ===
{| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! # !! Wrong Page !! Expected QID !! Actual QID !! revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was /* Summary Table */
revision.text:
== QID Contradictions Report ==
This page lists pages where the actual Wikidata QID does not match the expected mapping. For each contradiction, the correct page (that actually has the expected QID) is also listed.
'''Total contradictions found: 30''' * Pages with correct page found: 29 * Pages where correct page not found: 1
=== Summary Table ===
{| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! Correct Page(s) |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Futsuno Shrine (Q135039005)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Hafuritano Shrine (Q135039044)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Hatano Shrine (Q135039019)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Hatorino Shrine (Q135098838)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Honoikatsuchino Shrine (Q135038947)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Izanagi Shrine (Q11379365)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kahamatano Shrine (Q135039016)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kakitano Shrine (Q135039192)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kamo Shrine (Q135039165)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kamono Shrine (Q135098878)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kamusakino Shrine (Q135039190)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kataoka Shrine (Q43594918)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kawamata Shrine (Q11553360)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kineno Shrine (Q135039225)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kinpu Shrine (Q3197197)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Kuhiwokano Shrine (Q135038802)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Murayano Shrine (Q135098841)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Nagata Shrine (Q661395)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Nifuno Shrine (Q135038979)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Nomano Shrine (Q135039228)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Nomi Shrine (Q11646130)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Ohokurano Shrine (Q135038788)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Ohotsuno Shrine (Q135039122)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Okamino Shrine (Q135039195)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Sai Shrine (Q135098830)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Sakahino Shrine (Q135039131)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Sakatono Shrine (Q135039031)]] |- | [[Special:WhatLinksHere/Takase Shrine (Q11671973)]] |}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle%2FQID_contradictions here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle%2FQID_contradictions for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> == QID Contradictions Report ==
This page lists pages where the actual Wikidata QID does not match the expected mapping. For each contradiction, the correct page (that actually has the expected QID) is also listed.
'''Total contradictions found: 30''' * Pages with correct page found: 29 * Pages where correct page not found: 1
